title: Minimum Deletions to Make Character Frequencies Unique
titleCn: 字符频次唯一的最小删除次数

testcases.input: s = "aaabbbcc" Output: 2 Explanation: You can delete two 'b's resulting in the good string "aaabcc". Another way it to delete one 'b' and one 'c' resulting in the good string "aaabbc".
testcases.expectedOutput: 2 Explanation: You can delete two 'b's resulting in the good string "aaabcc". Another way it to delete one 'b' and one 'c' resulting in the good string "aaabbc".

testcases.input: s = "ceabaacb" Output: 2 Explanation: You can delete both 'c's resulting in the good string "eabaab". Note that we only care about characters that are still in the string at the end (i.e. frequency of 0 is ignored).
testcases.expectedOutput: 2 Explanation: You can delete both 'c's resulting in the good string "eabaab". Note that we only care about characters that are still in the string at the end (i.e. frequency of 0 is ignored).
